articles.title: SpaceX will launch Starship, the world's largest rocket, on critical Flight 13 test today. Here's what to expect.

articles.summary: The first of 10,000 missing black holes in the Omega Centauri globular cluster has been found thanks to teamwork by the Hubble and James Webb space telescopes.

articles.title: A Tide-Fueled Trove of Biodiversity in Guinea-Bissau
articles.summary: The expansive mudflats, sandy beaches, and mangrove forests of the Bijagós archipelago support an array of migratory shorebirds and large numbers of sea turtles.

articles.title: With climate ambitions in question, EU reforms carbon market

articles.title: EU's AI 'guardrails' cannot absorb rapid changes in technology, study warns
articles.summary: "Guardrails" built by the EU to govern AI fall short in both ambition and execution and have become too heavy to absorb rapid changes in technology, a new study in Big Data & Society warns.

articles.title: Why a Ukrainian cruise missile is flying with hobby drone hardware

articles.title: At least 12,000 excess deaths in Europe's June heat wave
articles.summary: At least 12,000 excess deaths were recorded across nine European countries during June's heat wave, national statistics indicated, a toll that could yet rise as more data are released, according to an AFP analysis.
